zh.Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Romania: 羅馬尼亞阿斯庫特亞 德 阿斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicolae Alexandru I Basarab of Valachia於大約1310年出生在羅馬尼亞阿斯庫特亞 德 阿斯時，他的父親Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walachei42歲，母親Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachia31歲。他於1326年與Maria Lackfi在羅馬尼亞阿斯庫特亞 德 阿斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1364年11月16日在羅馬尼亞t阿拉 洛尼亞斯卡享年55歲。

zh-hans.Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Romania: 罗马尼亚阿斯庫特亞 德 阿斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicolae Alexandru I Basarab of Valachia于大约1310年出生在罗马尼亚阿斯庫特亞 德 阿斯时，他的父亲Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walachei42岁，母亲Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachia31岁。他于1326年与Maria Lackfi在罗马尼亚阿斯庫特亞 德 阿斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1364年11月16日在罗马尼亚t阿拉 洛尼亞斯卡享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Basarab
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ukrainian, Rusyn, Moldovan, Romanian, and Polish: from Basarab, an ethnic name for someone from Bessarabia, now Moldova, or, in a transferred sense, for a Wallachian (see Vlachos ).

variants.name: Vlachos
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Greek Christos, Constantine, Dimitrios, Haralambos, Konstantinos, Koula, Labros, Pantelis, Stamatios, Vaios, Vasilios.

Greek: ethnic name for an Aromanian or Vlach, a member of Romanized, traditionally pastoralist population living in the Balkans, speaking a language closely related to Romanian. Through ethnic stereotyping, the Greek ethnic name, which is cognate with Slavic Vlah (see Vlasic ), came to denote a highlander. Any of these senses could be involved in the development of the surname. It is also a shortened form of compound surnames beginning with Vlach-, for example Vlachogiannis, meaning ‘John the Aromanian, John the hillbilly’, and Vlachakis (see Vlahakis ). Compare Vlahos .

nameMeanings.name: Nicolae
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nicolao
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

nameMeanings.name: Alexandru
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicolae Alexandru I Basarab of Valachia was born about 1310, in Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Romania, his father, Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walachei, was 42 and his mother, Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachia, was 31. He married Maria Lackfi in 1326, in Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Romania. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 16 November 1364, in Wallachia, Romania, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicolae Alexandru I Basarab of Valachia est né environ 1310, à Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Roumanie, son père, Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walachei, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachia, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Maria Lackfi en 1326, à Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Roumanie. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 16 novembre 1364, à Valachie, Roumanie, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicolae Alexandru I Basarab of Valachia um 1310 in Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Rumänien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walachei 42 und seine Mutter Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachia 31. Er hat 1326 in Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Rumänien Maria Lackfi geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 16. November 1364 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Walachei, Rumänien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicolae Alexandru I Basarab of Valachia è nato il circa 1310 nel Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Romania, il suo padre, Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walachei, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachia, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Maria Lackfi nel 1326, nel Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Romania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 16 novembre 1364, nel Țara Românească, Romania, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicolae Alexandru I Basarab of Valachiaが約1310年にルーマニアアルジェsクウルテア ド アルジェsで生まれた時，父Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walacheiは42歳，母Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachiaは31歳であった。1326年にルーマニアアルジェsクウルテア ド アルジェsでMaria Lackfiと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1364年11月16日にルーマニアtアラ ロムaネアスクaで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicolae Alexandru I Basarab of Valachia(이)가 대략 1310년 루마니아 아그s 커테아 데 아그s에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walachei(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachia(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1326년 루마니아 아그s 커테아 데 아그s에서 Maria Lackfi(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1364년 11월 16일 루마니아 t아라 롬a니아스ca에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicolae Alexandru I Basarab of Valachia nasceu aproximadamente 1310, em Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Romênia, seu pai, Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walachei, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachia, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Maria Lackfi em 1326, em Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Romênia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 16 de novembro de 1364, em Țara Românească, Romênia, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicolae Alexandru I Basarab of Valachia родился около 1310 г. в местности куртеа де аргеs, аргеs, Румыния, его отцу по имени Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walachei было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachia, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria Lackfi в 1326 г. в местности куртеа де аргеs, аргеs, Румыния. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 16 ноября 1364 г. в местности tара ромaнискa, Румыния в возрасте 55 лет.

sm.1340 to 1364: mai le 1340 e o'o I le 1364

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicolae Alexandru I Basarab of Valachia nació aproximadamente 1310, en Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Rumania, su papá, Prince Vlaicu Ivancu Basarab of Valachia Walachei, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Lady Miriam Margareta "Ana" Tarnova Of Wallachia, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Maria Lackfi en 1326, en Curtea de Argeş, Argeş, Rumania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 16 de noviembre de 1364, en Țara Românească, Rumania, a la edad de 55 años.
